name: Chandlers Landing Tennis
description: Chandlers Landing Tennis is a place to play pickleball in Rockwall, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The court lines are permanent. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms. Reservations are available.

name: Harry Myers Park
description: Come play pickleball at Harry Myers Park in Rockwall, TX! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: J.E.R. Chilton YMCA at Rockwall
description: J.E.R. Chilton YMCA at Rockwall is a place to play pickleball in Rockwall, TX. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Ladera Rockwall
description: Come play pickleball at Ladera Rockwall in Rockwall, TX! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Oasis Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Oasis Pickleball Club in Rockwall, TX! There are 42 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, locker rooms, trainers or lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, and wheelchair accessibility. You can’t reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $20/day drop in or $100 punch card (10 visits)

name: R.I.S.E
description: R.I.S.E is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rockwall, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Robert Smith Family Park
description: Come play pickleball at Robert Smith Family Park in Fate, TX! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Rockwall Golf and Athletic Club
description: Rockwall Golf and Athletic Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rockwall, TX. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: The Park at Hickory Creek
description: The Park at Hickory Creek is a place to play pickleball in Rockwall, TX. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.
